title: RBI scraps treasury bill sale to support banking liquidity
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has cancelled its scheduled sale of treasury bills.
*   This decision means funds will not be drained from the banking system, as would typically happen with a T-bill sale.
*   The move aims to support and maintain adequate liquidity (cash) within the banking sector.

title: Govt asks RBI to target retail inflation at 4% till Mar 2031
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Government has asked the RBI.
*   The directive is to target retail inflation at 4%.
*   This target will remain in effect until March 2031.

title: SEBI calls-on tech players to fight finfluencers
content:
SEBI is calling on technology companies to help combat the issue of "finfluencers" (financial influencers).
*   The market regulator aims to leverage tech expertise to address the spread of unregulated financial advice.
*   This move signifies SEBI's intent to use advanced tools and data to monitor and mitigate risks posed to investors by finfluencers.

title: Anduril, Palantir developing Golden Dome missile shield's software, source says
content:
Anduril and Palantir are reportedly developing software.
*   This software is intended for a defense system named the "Golden Dome" missile shield.
*   The information comes from an unnamed source, indicating it is not yet officially confirmed.
